snippet.title: Trump THREATENS MSNBC to ‘Make Them Pay for Their Illegal Political Activity’
snippet.description:
►Subscribe to Mediaite: https://bit.ly/3MjuECB

It appears that former President Donald Trump is not a fan of MSNBC, evidenced by a late-night social media post that attacked Comcast CEO Brian Roberts.

Welcome to Mediaite, THE site for news and opinion on the intersection of media and politics. Join Mediaite+  https://www.mediaite.com/subscribe/

► Website: https://www.mediaite.com/
► Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mediaite/
► X (Twitter): https://twitter.com/mediaite
► Threads: https://www.threads.net/@mediaite
► Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/mediaite

Trump posted on his Truth Social account his latest harangue targeting MSNBC, erroneously claiming that the left-of-center cable news outlet uses “FREE government approved airwaves.” MSNBC, like all cable news outlets, is on cable and not broadcast networks like ABC, CBS, NBC, and PBS. But that erroneous allegation may be embarrassing for the former president but it wasn’t the least of the eyebrow-raising comment.

Trump called the Comcast CEO Brian Roberts a “slimeball” ostensibly because he oversees a network that, in Trump’s esteem, is “nothing but a 24 hour hit job on Donald J. Trump and the Republican Party for purposes of ELECTION INTERFERENCE.”

Chapters:
00:00:00 - Trump's Attack on MSNBC
00:00:47 - Election Interference 
00:01:32 - Threatening Journalists and Freedom of Speech

#donaldtrump #truthsocial #msnbc

snippet.title: The Only SEAL Team 6 Operator That Went To Delta Force
snippet.description:
Chris VanSant, a former 1st Special Forces Operational Detachment–Delta (1st SFOD-D) operator, joins us for a two-part series on the Shawn Ryan Show. With a military experience of 20 years, Chris has served in the 75th Rangers, 82nd Airborne, Green Beret, and Delta Force. He has completed 11 combat deployments to Afghanistan, Iraq, and the Horn of Africa, and has taken part in nearly 600 combat missions, including the capture of Saddam Hussein and the hunt for al-Zarqawi

snippet.title: Woman wakes up in the coffin at her funeral #shorts
snippet.description:
An Ecuadorian woman has risen from the 'dead' after almost being buried alive.

Shocking video footage shows the moment 76-year-old Bella Montoya was rescued from her coffin, after being stuck inside for over four hours.

The woman was declared deceased after suffering a stroke in hospital and taken to a local funeral home for preparations.

#BuriedAlive #Ecuador #BellaMontoya #Coffin #10NewsFirst

snippet.title: 50 Cent: From Bullet Proofs To Tailored Suits | New Interview
snippet.description:
When 50 Cent wears a suit to an interview you know it's time to take notes because class is in session. Subscribe now: https://bjr.watch/subscribe

0:00 - 50 Cent interview Intro
0:19 - Hip-hop and youth culture
1:58 - How 50 stays "in tune"
4:26 - Expendables 4
6:29 - "Go straight to the source"
7:17 - Maintain relevance
8:57 - Why be independent 
16:58 - Being a mentor to others
19:12 - Build your team
21:40 - Opinions on the internet
23:23 - Remember your beginnings
27:36 - Building deep roots in industries
30:47 - Relying on others for resources
39:14 - The fall of R&B music
42:03 - Artists not taking responsibility
48:52 - The truth about "success"
52:17 - Politics and "politricks"
58:01 -  Be careful with commitment
1:01:02 - On global influence
1:07:01 - Being a trusted source
1:10:58 - Generational connection
1:19:40 - Being a brand
1:25:50 - On fame
1:30:39 - Relationships push you forward
1:34:37 - 50 Cent interview outro

In this extended interview, 50 Cent discusses his career trajectory and business ventures, including his sports partnerships with the Houston Rockets, Sacramento Kings, Houston Texans, Houston Astros, Indiana Pacers, Minnesota Timberwolves, and Vegas Golden Knights, with his Sire Spirits brand and G-Unity Foundation. During our extended interview, 50 Cent also shares his views on the power of music, reflecting on the contemporary landscape and its most prominent figures, and also discusses his upcoming role in Expandables 4, where he stars alongside Sylvester Stallone, Jason Statham, Dolph Lundgren, and Randy Couture. I also delvesinto the mindset and strategies 50 Cent uses to navigate business and life. Plus, he clowns Nick Cannon, talks Ice Spice, Nicki Minaj, Beyond and lots more! 

Audio production via 'Produced by Blanco' (instagram.com/by.blanco)
© 2023 Brian J. Roberts (instagram.com/mrbrianjroberts)

snippet.title: Margaret Thatcher Breaks Down in Tears (1991)
snippet.description:
In June 1991, Former Prime Minister Margaret Thatcher had to wipe away tears as she recounted the day she was forced to resign. The exclusive interview with ITN's Michael Brunson was the first time Thatcher had spoken publicly since her dramatic resignation as Prime Minister and leader of the Conservative Party in November 1990. 

#MargaretThatcher #Thatcher #UKPolitics #Politics #Conservative #PrimeMinister #Shorts 

To watch the full 25-minute interview on @FrontlinebyITN, follow the link below:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L9H5nGDVfQ8

To search the ITN Archive collection on Getty Images, follow the link below:

https://www.gettyimages.co.uk/footage/itn

🎥 Subscribe to our YouTube channel (tap the bell icon and stay up to date with all the latest ITN Archive videos!) - https://www.youtube.com/@ITNArchive
🎥 Follow us on Twitter - https://twitter.com/ITNArchive
🎥 Like us on Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/ITNArchiveITNP
🎥 Check out our TikTok - https://www.tiktok.com/@itnarchive1955
